MB-sPLS-XY GraphLearner: preproc -> MB-sPLS-XY -> learner

Source: R/graph_mbspls.R
mbsplsxy_graph_learner.Rd

MB-sPLS-XY GraphLearner: preproc -> MB-sPLS-XY -> learner

mbsplsxy_graph_learner(
  learner = NULL,
  blocks = NULL,
  task = NULL,
  task_type = c("classif", "regr"),
  site_correction = list(),
  site_correction_methods = list(),
  keep_site_col = FALSE,
  ncomp,
  k = 5,
  performance_metric = c("mac", "frobenius"),
  correlation_method = c("pearson", "spearman"),
  c_matrix = NULL,
  permutation_test = FALSE,
  n_perm = 500L,
  perm_alpha = 0.05,
  y_rep = 1L,
  emit_y_scores = FALSE,
  center_y = TRUE,
  scale_y = TRUE,
  id_suffix = NULL,
  log_env = NULL
)

Arguments

learner

Downstream learner. If NULL, a featureless learner matching the inferred supervised task type is used.

blocks, task, site_correction, site_correction_methods, keep_site_col

Preproc settings.

task_type

One of "classif" or "regr". Only used if learner and task do not jointly determine the target mode.

ncomp

Number of MB-sPLS-XY components.

k

k-NN for imputation (preproc).

performance_metric

"mac" or "frobenius".

correlation_method

"pearson" or "spearman".

c_matrix

Optional L1 constraint matrix for MB-sPLS-XY.

permutation_test, n_perm, perm_alpha

Train-time permutation test for MB-sPLS-XY.

y_rep

Integer replication count for the target block.

emit_y_scores

Logical; append Y-side scores to the transformed task.

center_y, scale_y

Logical target centering/scaling flags.

id_suffix

Optional suffix for PipeOp ids.

log_env

Shared environment (created if NULL).

Value

mlr3pipelines::GraphLearner

Contents

Developed by Stefan Coors, Clara Sophie Vetter.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
